evidenceContract.userBehavior: Inspect an actual layered illustration and the current canonical Tool/Skill context, compare viable animation techniques, and select or block the next technique without defaulting to generative video or starting production.
forbiddenFallback: invented Puppet, frame-animation, layered-2D, scene, or compositing support

observables.description: Source read, current context query, technique comparison, Tool absence, effective model, usage/context estimate, and no-fallback facts.

evidenceContract.expectedResult: The Agent reads the layered SVG, checks current capabilities, compares generative video, layered 2D, Puppet, frame animation, 3D scene/camera, and compositing against the source and target, then selects only a declared path or reports the preferred path unavailable.
evidenceContract.expectedFailure: Calling video or image generation, inventing support, omitting current context, or using a planning/legacy runtime fails.

steps.prompt:
$media-production 读取 @station-illustration.svg

这是一个可分层的静态车站插画。先检查当前会话实际可用的工具和 Skill 上下文，再比较生成式视频、分层 2D、Puppet、逐帧动画、3D 场景/摄影机与合成。目标是保留 Mara、红伞、无头灯列车和钟表的造型一致性，只让雨、伞和列车做克制运动。输出来源证据、各技术所需输入、当前 supported/degraded/unavailable 判断、选择或 blocked 结论及下一项可执行动作。不要假设未注册能力可用，不要生成图片或视频，不要预建节点图或固定工作流。
